heading: MAINTENANCE OF EFFORT FOR 2000-2001 SCHOOL YEAR
operative_text: Subject to Sections 1581.052 and 1581.053, and except as provided by Section 1581.054, a school district, other educational district whose employees are members of the Teacher Retirement System of Texas, participating charter school, or regional education service center that, for the 2000-2001 school year, paid amounts to share with employees the cost of coverage under a group health coverage plan shall, for each fiscal year, use to provide health coverage an amount for each participating employee at least equal to the amount computed as provided by this section.
_note: No defined terms explicitly defined in this section. Subsection (b) provides the computation methodology. Subsection (c) directs deposits to fund described in §1581.052(b).
